name: Chili's Chicken Enchilada Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pound process American cheese, cut in small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the chicken base and onion, then stir in the spices. Cook until the onions are soft and clear, about 5 minutes.
2. In another container, mix the masa harina with 1 quart water until all lumps dissolve. Stir this mixture into the sautéed onions in the pot. Bring to a boil.
3. Once the mixture begins to bubble, continue cooking for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly to eliminate any raw taste from the masa harina.
4. Add the remaining 3 quarts of water to the pot and return the mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the crushed tomatoes and cook until hot, about 5 minutes.
6. Add the shredded American cheese and stir until melted. Finally, add the cooked chicken and heat through for an additional minute or two.
Makes 1 1/2 gallons or 16-20 servings. NOTE: The recipe can be halved as needed.
